home.heroDescription: A personal website featuring blog posts, portfolio projects, and professional resume. Built with React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.
home.blogDescription: Technical articles, tutorials, and thoughts on software development.
home.portfolioDescription: Showcase of projects and applications I've built and contributed to.
home.resumeDescription: Professional experience, skills, and educational background.
home.aboutDescription1: This is a personal website built with modern web technologies including React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components on the frontend, paired with a Go backend using the Gin framework.
home.aboutDescription2: The site features a full-featured blog with markdown support, project portfolio, resume section, comment system, admin dashboard, and GitHub OAuth authentication.

footer.description: Personal website with blog, portfolio, and resume features.
